creator: kmachine@free.fr
text:
For information purposes, nowadays, on a 14.2-RELEASE with drm-515-kmod or drm-61-kmod, there is always no sound in HDMI and cat /dev/sndstat shows the same.

Side note: I realized that drm-515-kmod is preferable for HD630 because I get thousands errors with drm-61-kmod when I play a movie (like "drmn0: [drm] ERROR Fault errors on pipe A: 0x00000080").
